# Package Evaluation Report

## Job Properties

*Commits:* [adienes/julia@2dd97ac5e3f87a4c46353828b4c26349564c4a92](https://github.com/adienes/julia/commit/2dd97ac5e3f87a4c46353828b4c26349564c4a92) vs [JuliaLang/julia@de94fcb0b3902d3f120519584e8af029a2df44f3](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/commit/de94fcb0b3902d3f120519584e8af029a2df44f3)

*Comparison Diff:* [link](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/compare/de94fcb0b3902d3f120519584e8af029a2df44f3...adienes/julia:2dd97ac5e3f87a4c46353828b4c26349564c4a92)

*Triggered By:* [link](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/pull/61568#issuecomment-4254013441)

Testing took 20 hours, 5 minutes, 30 seconds (or, sequentially, 37 days, 18 hours, 42 minutes, 30 seconds to evaluate 23398 packages).

In total, 11699 packages were evaluated, out of which 5882 successfully tested, 0 were not tested but did load successfully, 459 crashed, 3945 failed and 1413 were skipped.


<details><summary>On this build, 24 packages started failing. Click here for the Nanosoldier invocation to re-run these tests.</summary>
<p>

```
@nanosoldier `runtests(["MultifileArrays", "FastRunningMedian", "BiBufferedStreams", "ArrayInterfaceCore", "Visor", "DiskArrays", "ParallelTestRunner", "Kronecker", "Catch22", "Graph500", "TextParse", "SemiLagrangian", "FrankWolfe", "MCMCTempering", "PosteriorStats", "ElemCo", "MimiSSPs", "OnlinePCA", "PeriodicMatrices", "MakieSequenceLogos", "Trixi", "MultiAgentPathFinding", "PathWeightSampling", "MimiBRICK"])`
```

</p>
</details>
